ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "hard_hitting_ability" INTEGER /* Player's hard hitting ability rating */,
  "running_between_wickets" REAL /* Player's running between wickets skill rating */,
  "wicket_taking_ability" INTEGER /* Player's wicket taking ability rating */,
  "consistency" INTEGER /* Player's consistency rating */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "batting_style" TEXT /* Batting style (e.g., Right-hand, Left-hand) */,
  "bowling_style" TEXT /* Bowling style (e.g., Right-arm fast, Left-arm spin) */,
  "current_team" TEXT /* Current team the player is signed with */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Player's status (e.g., active, retired, injured) */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in kilograms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batting_stats" (
  "batting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting performance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "balls" INTEGER /* Number of balls faced */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours hit */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes hit */,
  "strike_rate" REAL /* Strike rate of the player */,
  "dismissal" TEXT /* How the player was dismissed */,
  "not_out" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player was not out */,
  "highest_score" INTEGER /* Highest score in the match */,
  "lowest_score" INTEGER /* Lowest score in the match */,
  "boundary_rate" REAL /* Rate of boundaries (fours and sixes) per 100 balls faced */,
  "dot_balls_faced" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls faced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batting_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bowling_stats" (
  "bowling_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bowling performance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "overs" REAL /* Number of overs bowled */,
  "maidens" INTEGER /* Number of maidens bowled */,
  "runs_conceded" INTEGER /* Number of runs conceded */,
  "wickets" INTEGER /* Number of wickets taken */,
  "economy" REAL /* Economy rate of the bowler */,
  "dots" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls bowled */,
  "fours" INTEGER /* Number of fours conceded */,
  "sixes" INTEGER /* Number of sixes conceded */,
  "wd" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled */,
  "nb" INTEGER /* Number of no balls bowled */,
  "balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Total number of balls bowled */,
  "dot_balls_bowled" INTEGER /* Number of dot balls bowled */,
  "maiden_overs" INTEGER /* Number of maiden overs bowled */,
  "wides" INTEGER /* Number of wides bowled */,
  "no_balls" INTEGER /* Number of no balls bowled */,
  "boundary_rate" REAL /* Rate of boundaries (fours and sixes) conceded per 100 balls bowled */,
  "overs_per_wicket" REAL /* Average number of overs bowled per wicket taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bowling_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bowling_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fielding_stats" (
  "fielding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fielding performance */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "catches" INTEGER /* Number of catches taken */,
  "batting_points" INTEGER /* Batting points earned */,
  "fielding_points" INTEGER /* Fielding points earned */,
  "bowling_points" INTEGER /* Bowling points earned */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned for the match */,
  "stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of stumpings */,
  "run_outs" INTEGER /* Number of run outs */,
  "throws" INTEGER /* Number of throws to the stumps */,
  "missed_catches" INTEGER /* Number of missed catches */,
  "missed_stumpings" INTEGER /* Number of missed stumpings */,
  "missed_run_outs" INTEGER /* Number of missed run outs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fielding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fielding_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the cricket team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the team */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_captain" TEXT /* Name of the current team captain */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the current coach */,
  "team_status" TEXT /* Status of the team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "pitch_type" TEXT /* Type of pitch (e.g., grass, artificial) */,
  "average_run_rate" REAL /* Average run rate at the venue */,
  "average_wicket_rate" REAL /* Average wicket rate at the venue */,
  "venue_status" TEXT /* Status of the venue (e.g., open, closed for maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league" TEXT /* Name of the league (e.g., IPL, BBL) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches in the season */,
  "champion" TEXT /* Name of the champion team */,
  "runner_up" TEXT /* Name of the runner-up team */,
  "most_valuable_player" TEXT /* Name of the most valuable player of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playoffs" (
  "playoff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playoff match */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the match */,
  "playoff_type" TEXT /* Type of playoff (e.g., qualifier, eliminator) */,
  "playoff_date" TEXT /* Date of the playoff match */,
  "playoff_venue" TEXT /* Venue of the playoff match */,
  "playoff_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the playoff match */,
  "playoff_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the playoff match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playoff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playoffs_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
